programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

Operation Barbarossa - War Of Annihilation - Part 1: Summer
programme.desc: On 22 June 1941, the German Wehrmacht launched a war of aggression against the Soviet Union. Under the code name ‘Operation Barbarossa', the campaign aimed to bring the vast country in the east to its knees. Millions of people died as a result.

programme.title: The Chefs
programme.desc: What is their recipe for success? What challenges do they face? How do women in Asian society assert themselves in an industry still dominated by men? What is currently in vogue in the culinary world? In what way do cultural, social and ethical considerations also play a role?

programme.title: Bubble-Net Teamwork - How Whales Catch Their Lunch
programme.desc: Humpback whales hunt in teams, building a 'net' of bubbles around fish. China and Europe investigate Earth's magnetic field. And shock: scrolling wastes time!

programme.title: How Africa Sets Its Own Creative Standards
programme.desc: Today, host Bibi Raii meets with Juliet Olanipekun, Princess of Arigigi Akoko to talk about the luxury of Nigerian designs and to try them on - as this episode is all about: African Taste, on African terms.

programme.title: Understand The World, One Story At A Time
programme.desc: Our deep dive format explains the stories that matter - with clarity, context and journalistic rigor. Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover what's driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.desc: Germany's Transrapid maglev train was once hailed as the future of transportation, reaching speeds of up to 450 km/h. REV explores why the ambitious project failed. Also, we puts the new BMW M5 Touring to the test.

programme.title: E17 - The Chickening
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to carry Jackson's big blue 'chicken' Ludwig (who definitely isn't a chicken) to the country fair. But the easily-startled bird gets away from them - the chase is on!

programme.title: E40 - Early Baby
programme.desc: Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: E5 - Crab
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'crab', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: E3 - Okido In Bloom
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. The sky is full of big grey rain clouds in the real world. Messy watches his sandcastle outside get washed away by the pouring rain. Why does it have to rain? He competes in the OKIDO flower competition and finds out why.

programme.title: E42 - Show And Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: E41 - Stickbird
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: E24 - Ready Or Not
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let's play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: E36 - Backpackers
programme.desc: Mum and Dad are going on an adventure wearing the kids as their cheeky backpacks! Seeing the sights and buying street food, backpacking is a blast - until they lose their passports.

programme.title: E39 - Bad Mood
programme.desc: Bingo is playing Bad Mood with Dad, standing on his feet as Dad stomps around the house, controlling everything Bingo does and causing chaos.

programme.title: E30 - Andy And The Ethiopian Wolves
programme.desc: When the photos Mr Hammond took of a family of Ethiopian wolves are mysteriously blank, it's up to Andy to save the day.

programme.desc: The Squirrels decide to start their own radio show.

programme.desc: Duggee helps the Squirrels learn about all the things trees do for creatures around them.

programme.desc: From feeling nervous and shy, to making a million friends! The funny animals chat about all the things they love about school.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC's flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Access Middle East
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world's most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: Morning Call
programme.desc: Morning Call, anchored by Morgan Brennan, delivers the essential market intelligence that drives the trading day ahead. The program captures breaking business news as it unfolds and tracks pre market equity moves, commodity swings, U.S. futures, and overnight action across global markets.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: E4 - Out All Night
programme.desc: Will and Carlton feel the pressure of running 'Blackcess'; everyone rallies around Hilary.

programme.title: E9 - Best Of Best Friends
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney have a falling out and hold auditions to find new best friends.

programme.title: E12 - Pool For Love
programme.desc: Building a pool in the backyard would wreck Leon's tree, which is the last thing Rodney wants.

programme.title: E31 - Sesame Street's Lost And Found
programme.desc: Grover is looking for something that his mommy needs but he just can’t remember what it’s called.

programme.title: E1 - Hallobeanies
programme.desc: Lumpus' favorite holiday is ruined when the Jelly Beans can't stop trick or treating.

programme.title: E6 - Baggage
programme.desc: Will brings his parents, Vy and Lou, together to heal the past; Carlton sees a new side of Amira.

programme.title: E7 - Western Regional Finals
programme.desc: Superbowl champion Victor Cruz and professional stuntwoman and “American Ninja Warrior” star Jessie Graff return along with four other top competitors for one last shot at redemption. The contenders must face off in a brand-new three-way battle before advancing to a classic head-to-head competition. The last competitors standing must defeat the reigning Titans on Mt. Olympus to advance to the championship round. Dwayne Johnson serves as Host while Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E10 - 用一條短視頻尋找拍攝位置
programme.desc: 邀請了馬清運、伊能靜、楊芸晴等嘉賓擔任「超腦護航員」；節目根據“八大未來力”的概念來進行項目設置，少年們需要用創造性思維激發想像力，利用從紙筆到程式設計來破解難題，從而喚醒大腦活力，選拔出最具“未來力”的少年。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 蒼梧國大將軍之女羲和遭滅門及暗算，重生為廢柴嫡女沈千夜。她懷著滿腔不甘踏上復仇之路，與疑似凶手的「小皇叔」裴夙糾纏不休。在調查真相的過程中，兩人從相互算計到聯手抗敵，揭開了蒼梧國隱藏的重重秘密。

programme.title: E16

programme.title: E61
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 蒼梧國大將軍之女羲和遭滅門及暗算，重生為廢柴嫡女沈千夜。她懷著滿腔不甘踏上復仇之路，與疑似凶手的「小皇叔」裴夙糾纏不休。在調查真相的過程中，兩人從相互算計到聯手抗敵，揭開了蒼梧國隱藏的重重秘密。

programme.title: E2 - 高燃團隊戰來襲
programme.desc: 百位少年齊聚一堂，智慧與勇氣同時接受考驗，黃聖依、黃子弘凡、龐博、張雨綺、李雪琴、陳銘等嘉賓將一直陪伴，引領他們突破自我；到底誰能突破第一道考驗，順利進入組隊資格賽？誰又將通過豐富知識儲備量「站」到最後？一同見證智慧賽場的巔峰瞬間吧！

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E288 -Cold War 1994
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Under the Light
programme.desc: Su Jianming, the son of Deputy Mayor Zheng Gang of Jinjiang City, defies his father's counsel and attends a cunning dinner invitation from the wealthiest man in Jinjiang City, Li Zhitian. To his astonishment, he becomes an unwilling witness to a shocking incident where someone is coerced into thrusting their hand into a simmering hotpot. As past mysteries resurface, hidden factions from various quarters plot and scheme, employing intricate strategies, scrutiny, and suspicion. Amidst the web of conflicting desires, the pressing question remains: who will ultimately unveil the final mask?

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E288 -Cold War 1994
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Dojo and May are a loving couple. Because Dojo has a brain tumor and needs 1 million baht for the operation, they decide to rob a money exchange store. Unluckily, the couple with 10 unfortunate patrons of the money exchange center are held hostages by 3 professional robbers on the same day. It is a robbery inside another robbery as well as some secrets among these people will be revealed. What could possibly happen when these people are trapped in the store with no way to escape?

programme.desc: A reunion between two classmates lead to infidelity and even crime in Woody Allen's meditation on luck and chance.

programme.title: E4 - The Tip Off
programme.desc: The Malaysian Maritime Enforcement Agency is tasked to intercept two ships with illegal immigrants on board. Meanwhile the Forensics unit investigates a shooting incident in the neighbourhood of Bangsar.

programme.title: E4 - Linda Carty
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: E4 - Soldier Down At Fort Meade
programme.desc: For nearly a year, investigators from multiple law enforcement agencies work tirelessly to uncover a twisted tale of secrets and lies that led to murder.

programme.title: E1 - Coral Sea Dreaming
programme.desc:
Coral Sea Dreaming enters into the very heart of life - and death - on a coral reef. The film follows a story that spans 500 million years and stars some of the most exotic and wondrous marine creatures on earth. Coral is the planets greatest natural architect, and coral reefs boast the highest biodiversity of any ecosystem.
We meet thousands of reef inhabitants, from ancient turtles to feeding sharks, adorable pygmy seahorses and savage sea slugs, witness a manta ray ballet and courting octopus. Specialized state-of-the-art High Definition technology captures these lives with unprecedented intimacy, illustrating elaborate courtship displays, mating rituals, feeding frenzies, intense nighttime predation, cannibalism and chemical warfare.
Filmed over 2000 dives on coral reef ecosystems; The Great Barrier Reef, Ningaloo Reef, Papua New Guinea and at the Coral Sea; Coral Sea Dreaming is a celebration of reefs now under threat of ocean acidification and climate change. There is much t

programme.title: E8 - Hyrox
programme.desc: The hottest new sport of hybrid games sweeping the world is Hyrox, so the team puts their fitness to the test in Melbourne.

programme.title: E1 - Beauty and the Reef
programme.desc: This is a crucial documentary told by those who have lived and breathed every facet of this reef and been the advocates long before people understood the changes.. The vision of 10,000 dives through the producer half of these on the Great Barrier reef to provide the avenue of understanding of change. The knowledge of one of the worlds leading marine biologist who has spent his life in the water and advised governments on upcoming changes is world class.. Lin Sutherland has published hundreds of article on the marine environment, has been a photographer, videographer and passionate advocate who has always understood the journey of the Great barrier reef, few people have the insight into this ecosystem like her. This will be a film of a lifetime.

programme.title: E107 - The Crew Builds A Beaver Home / The Crew Fixes A Road
programme.desc: The power is out in Builder Cove! When the pups find out a beaver is to blame, they've got to build him a new home to bring the power back. // When Speed Meister damages the road ahead of the town helper parade, the pups work fast to repave the way.

programme.title: E102 - Bada-Bam / The Barbamartians
programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: E118 - The Crew Builds A Library Tea Shop / The Crew Builds A Dance Floor
programme.desc: Construction on the first Builder Cove library is abuzz with bees! This calls for an extra sweet constuction solution. / Grandpa Gravel teaches Charger all his best moves for the big dance contest. But will a runaway disco ball cost them first place?

programme.title: E107 - Nanny Plum's Lesson / Mrs Witch
programme.desc: Nanny Plum gets blown away. Ben, Holly and Gaston the Ladybird come to her rescue. // Queen Thistle reads Ben and Holly a book about a nasty witch, so Nanny takes them to meet a real one. But Nanny is rude, and the witch freezes her with magic.

programme.title: E126 - The Crew Builds A Treehouse / The Crew Builds A Chicken Feeder
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose's favorite tree might be off limits for climbing unless Rubble and Grandpa can come up with a solution. / The Crew build a feeder for Farmer Zoe's chickens, but when they get loose, it's up to the pups to safely rescue them.

programme.title: E409 - The Crew Builds A Pancake Cafe
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew wants to make the biggest pancake ever! But it's a sticky situation when Speed Meister wants to beat them to it.

programme.title: E108 - Elf Joke Day / King Thistle's New Clothes
programme.desc: The Wise Old Elf plays a trick on Nanny Plum, but she gets her revenge by turning the Wise Old Elf into a snail. // Snooty King and Queen Marigold are coming to visit. When the King's new clothes get dirty, Nanny accidentally shrinks them all.

programme.title: E907 - The Dragon Game
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, Crusher, and Pickle are magically transported into an enchanted board game called The Dragon Game! Now, the four friends must overcome the game's dragon-themed challenges to win!

programme.title: E908 - Monster Machines At The Movies
programme.desc: Grab your popcorn, 'cause it's time for a monster machine movie party! Join Blaze and his family as they watch three movies-a superhero movie, an astronaut movie, and a detective movie-to earn a special surprise reward!

programme.title: E409 - The Crew Builds A Pancake Cafe
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew wants to make the biggest pancake ever! But it's a sticky situation when Speed Meister wants to beat them to it.

programme.title: E116 - Hiccupism / Silence Please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: E151 - Daddy's Movie Camera
programme.desc: Daddy gets a new video camera. First, Peppa shows him how to work it, and then he records Peppa being silly.

programme.title: E152 - School Play
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends take part in a school play about Little Red Riding Hood, but Pedro Pony is nervous to be on the stage.

programme.title: E201 - Polly's Holiday
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa's pet, Polly Parrot comes to stay. Peppa and George love Polly Parrot. She is very funny and repeats everything anyone says. When Polly flies away, no one knows how to get her back, until George comes up with a very clever plan.

programme.title: E108 - Elf Joke Day / King Thistle's New Clothes
programme.desc: The Wise Old Elf plays a trick on Nanny Plum, but she gets her revenge by turning the Wise Old Elf into a snail. // Snooty King and Queen Marigold are coming to visit. When the King's new clothes get dirty, Nanny accidentally shrinks them all.

programme.title: E409 - The Crew Builds A Pancake Cafe
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew wants to make the biggest pancake ever! But it's a sticky situation when Speed Meister wants to beat them to it.

programme.desc: Daddy gets a new video camera. First, Peppa shows him how to work it, and then he records Peppa being silly.

programme.title: E152 - School Play
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends take part in a school play about Little Red Riding Hood, but Pedro Pony is nervous to be on the stage.

programme.title: E309 - A Dog For Dora / Super Pozole
programme.desc: Dora gets a new puppy that makes her cat Lucky jealous. After he runs away, Dora tracks Lucky down to remind him of how loved he is. / Today is the championship game, but all of Dora's friends have a cold. Dora helps them feel better in time to play!

programme.title: E108 - Elf Joke Day / King Thistle's New Clothes
programme.desc: The Wise Old Elf plays a trick on Nanny Plum, but she gets her revenge by turning the Wise Old Elf into a snail. // Snooty King and Queen Marigold are coming to visit. When the King's new clothes get dirty, Nanny accidentally shrinks them all.

programme.title: E409 - The Crew Builds An Airplane Wash
programme.desc: When Camila's plane gets dirty from leading migrating ducks home, the pups find a way to wash the plane... in the sky!

programme.title: E409 - The Crew Builds A Pancake Cafe
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew wants to make the biggest pancake ever! But it's a sticky situation when Speed Meister wants to beat them to it.

programme.title: E224 - Pups Save A Pizza / Pups Save Skye
programme.desc: Alex and Mr. Porter are delivering pizza dough for a big party when the van spins out of control. Pups to the rescue! // Skye is on her way to Jake's Mountain when she crash lands in the snow. Ryder calls Everest to save the day!

programme.title: E207 - Lock 'N Loud
programme.desc: After Dad gets upset with the kids for never locking the front door, the kids take home security to the next level.

programme.title: E5 - Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Join Cody and Nina for a day of friendly competition! Imagine playing in the World Cup, race as the tortoise and the hare, and challenge the parents to a soccer match. Learn that being fast isn't always what makes you a winner!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns how to play soccer! With help from his family, he practices his skills and learns that sharing the ball with friends makes the game even more fun. Get ready to move your body and score the winning goal!

programme.title: E1 - Messy Mayhem in the Clubhouse!
programme.desc: Get ready for some messy mayhem in the clubhouse! The chaos begins when a slime volcano erupts, & the friends have to jump on pillows to avoid the gooey mess. Then, Boba finds a magical mirror that creates a colorful clone of him every time he looks! Can he hide all the new Bobas before JJ finds out? The messy fun continues as the friends chase a fly during breakfast & Wally tries to sneak a bite of frosting while baking alphabet cupcakes.

programme.title: E18 - JJ's Animal Friends & Counting!
programme.desc: Join JJ for fun with animal friends & counting! JJ has to find five little ducks that ran away from their bath! Then, Bear helps JJ search nature to find his missing teddy bear. The animal fun continues as JJ plays hide-and-seek with shark toys, counts baby ducklings at the park & watches ten little dinosaur eggs hatch! Plus, act out the story of the 'Three Little Pigs' & sing along to 'Little Miss Muffet'!

programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns how to play soccer! With help from his family, he practices his skills and learns that sharing the ball with friends makes the game even more fun. Get ready to move your body and score the winning goal!

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: Two Days And One Night 4 S4
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: KBS World News Today
programme.desc: KBS World Daily English News Anchor : Choi Kyu-yeon

programme.title: Music Bank
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: Stars' Top Recipe At Fun-Staurant
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist Of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Gising Pilipinas[Live]
programme.desc: Morning Newscast

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E1 - Mind Game Masters
programme.desc: Before World War II, board games were mostly simple, but postwar peace and prosperity revealed a demand for more challenging pastimes. After decades of struggle, three different innovators break the mould.

programme.title: E8 - Operation Torch
programme.desc: In Operation Torch, the first joint U.S.-British offensive of the war, thousands of inexperienced U.S. troops face off against the hardened German Afrika Korps and the infamous Field Marshall Erwin Rommel.

programme.title: E2 - Strange Sightings
programme.desc: They say seeing is believing-but these sightings will make you question everything. From stone-throwing jungle apes to swarms of sinister clowns stalking the suburbs, these are the strangest encounters.

programme.title: E8 - Mystifying Cursed Objects
programme.desc: Ancient cultures around the world have aroused fascination and provoked fear with curses and objects used to conjure them, like tablets and stones. But is there proof that some might have actually worked?

programme.title: E9 - Most Valuable Toys
programme.desc: From Lionel Trains to video games, for the right collector, our childhood toys can be worth millions! Over the last decades, people have paid some truly outrageous prices for the toys they always wanted.

programme.title: E3 - Butterfly Knife In Your Stomach?
programme.desc: The Batangas region of the Philippines is famous for its butterfly-knife makers and wielders. Jaime learns a few tricks as she passes through but when she comes under unexpected attack, will they work?

programme.title: E3 - Into the Fire
programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E5 - Einstein Rules
programme.desc: Come full circle as the dry season descends and the Waterfront Pride enjoys good hunting and renewed confidence in their territory. Then celebrate the success of former outsider Einstein, who gets down to business as the king of his very own pride.

programme.title: E1 - Body Language
programme.desc: Join researchers as they study how animals communicate. Find out how wolves use their body language to unite the pack and maintain a sophisticated social structure, and see the astounding number of gestures chimps use to communicate.

programme.title: E6 - Heir to the Clan
programme.desc: Spotty, a female hyena cub, is destined to be leader of the Chimbwe clan that lives in the heart of Zambia’s Luangwa Valley. But she has yet to prove herself. Witness her fight to find her place in this savagely competitive family.

programme.title: E5 - Cat Country
programme.desc: Join a group of wildlife scientists tracking the comeback of the ocelot in the Pantanal. Check in on their network of trail cameras, which capture the movements of this elusive spotted cat, and see the perils it faces, including giant anacondas.

programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Fire
programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E6 - Heir to the Clan
programme.desc: Spotty, a female hyena cub, is destined to be leader of the Chimbwe clan that lives in the heart of Zambia’s Luangwa Valley. But she has yet to prove herself. Witness her fight to find her place in this savagely competitive family.

programme.title: E5 - Cat Country
programme.desc: Join a group of wildlife scientists tracking the comeback of the ocelot in the Pantanal. Check in on their network of trail cameras, which capture the movements of this elusive spotted cat, and see the perils it faces, including giant anacondas.

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Fully Funny - Eric Kot
programme.desc: Eric Kot's hilarious image has been widely recognized by Hong Kong audience on big-screen, particularly after portrayed the character of a zany assistant in ‘Tricky Business' and an attentive killer in ‘You Shoot, I Shoot'. Having years of acting experience, he has formed his own view of how to film a comedy. Apart from being in front of cameras, he had been invited by acclaimed filmmaker Wong Kar-wai to participate his work at directorial role and encountered Asian star Takeshi Kaneshiro behind-the-scene. In this episode, Eric is going to tell his stories you might not know about.

programme.title: Plain Jane To The Rescue
programme.desc: Jenny, with the plain looks but a heart of gold, she is always in between jobs. Once she gets a job, her knack of creating awkward situations immediately loses it for her. Fang is her suitor, but he gets nowhere as the girl has no time for love, so Fang goes along with her in job hunting. A big group called Sanda wants to take over the whole city through take-over deals. They are ruthless and have thrown thousands into the streets. Jenny and Fang, bungling as they are, become the vanguard of a movement against the great conglomerate. They were even being hunted by the group and their life was threatened...

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。
